item.headline: Senior Director & Global Head - Data Center Infrastructure VC / M&A @ Cisco Investments

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: Senior Director & Global Head - Data Center Infrastructure VC / M&A @ Cisco Investments

experience.position: Global Head - Data Center Infrastructure VC / M&A
experience.description:
I lead Cisco Investments & Corporate Development team responsible for sourcing, evaluating and executing venture investments and M&A globally in the Data Center Infrastructure domain.

Selected M&A:
- Splunk
- IMImobile (CPaaS / ~$730M)
- Involvio (Education Tech, Student Experience, Engagement and Retention / Undisclosed)
- Dashbase.io (Observability, Logs and Events Analytics / Undisclosed)
- Exablaze (Ultra Low Latency Networking / Undisclosed)
- Skyport (Secured Hyperconverged Infrastructure / Undisclosed)

•Senior client coverage and execution team member with a particular focus on Enterprise Software
•Led coverage of the Industrial Technology & Software vertical
•Execute M&A, debt and equity transactions, managing all aspects of projects through direct interaction with strategic/private equity clients and coordination across various teams
•Led training, staffing and development of junior bankers in SF office and responsible for firm-wide recruiting at west coast schools (USC, UCLA, UC Berkeley and Stanford)

►Associate (2010 – 2014); Vice President (2014 – 2016)

•Senior client coverage and execution team member advising private equity and corporate clients in the broader Industrial Technology sector
•Managed deal teams and led execution of acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures, spin-offs, recapitalizations, leveraged buyouts as well as other strategic and capital markets transactions 
•Strong deal execution experience with completed transactions representing over $16B of M&A, $15B of Leveraged Finance, and $3B of Equity in aggregate deal values
•Held various managerial roles including the staffer role and led training, staffing and development of junior bankers

►Analyst (2008 – 2010); Associate (2010)

•Core member of execution teams in multiple buy-side and sell-side M&A transactions across a broad range of industries, with a particular focus on the Technology and Industrials sectors
•Worked closely with management to prepare companies for M&A processes, including creating marketing materials, financial models and board presentations
•Prepared pitch books including extensive valuation analyses (M&A, DCF and LBO) to contribute to deal origination

•Advised corporate and private equity clients on complex accounting and valuation issues associated with a variety of transactions and structures including: M&As, LBOs, recapitalizations, complex financial instruments and derivatives

education.schoolName: University of Michigan - Stephen M. Ross School of Business

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Chief Marketing Officer | $900M in Realized Value | Let’s golf! ⛳️🏌🏻
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 30, 2007, Denmark worked with Mike on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: Michael Lim truly has a great vision and fun to work with. He made the mundane task in the corporate environment tolerable. Mike a wise person and does his work diligently.
